variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHHP40037 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 16.9021SH6SLF000V
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHHP40037 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Eppensteiner 16.9021SH6SLF000V. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHHP40037
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 5µ @ β200

variants.title: Filtrec D112G06BV Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 169021SH6SLF000V
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec D112G06BV. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the D112G06BV provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 5µ @ β200
